# Blu Ocean Innovations

> Blu Ocean Innovations is an AI visibility agency in Las Vegas, Nevada. We help businesses get found, cited, and recommended by AI search engines — ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Google AI Overviews, Grok, and Perplexity — through citation building, structured data, and digital authority infrastructure built specifically for the AI era.

## About

- **Legal name:** Blu Ocean Innovations LLC
- **Trading as:** Blu Ocean Innovations / Blu Ocean AI
- **Headquarters:** Las Vegas, Nevada, United States
- **Service area:** Las Vegas, Henderson, North Las Vegas, Paradise, and clients nationwide across the US
- **Phone:** +1 (702) 727-6211
- **Email:** info@bluoceanrising.com
- **Website:** https://bluoceaninnovations.ai
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific
- **Slogan:** Own the AI Conversation
- **Founded by:** Shaun Lowe (CEO)
- **Industry:** Marketing, AI visibility, Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), digital authority

## What we do

We control what AI systems say about a business. Our work spans three phases (the "Tide Strategy"):

1. **Foundation** — Audit and structure your digital identity so AI can find and verify it (schema, NAP consistency, entity building).
2. **Authority** — Build citations and references across the platforms AI models train on and pull from.
3. **Domination** — Become the AI-recommended choice in your category through ongoing citation campaigns, content, and reputation management.

This sits across an 8-engine system: AI search, citations, content, reviews, social proof, Google Business Profile, schema, and authority links.

## Service tiers

We offer four tiers, all month-to-month:

| Tier | Setup | Monthly | Best for |
|------|-------|---------|----------|
| **Sea Turtle** — Entry Visibility (Self-Guided) | $297 | $97 | Businesses who want monthly AI visibility insights and a do-it-yourself fix guide. |
| **Dolphin** — Citation Authority (Done-For-You) | $1,497 | $497 | Businesses that want active citation campaigns and a 90-day measurable visibility goal. |
| **Shark** — Strategy & Execution (Best Value) | $2,997 | $997 | Businesses that want a complete AI roadmap with full implementation across every major AI platform. |
| **Whale** — Complete Domination (White-Glove) | $4,997 | $2,997 | Businesses that want priority white-glove execution and to become THE AI-recommended choice in their market. |

## Topics we are an authority on

AI visibility · Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) · Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) · ChatGPT optimization · Google Gemini optimization · Google AI Overviews · Grok optimization · Perplexity optimization · Schema.org structured data · Entity building · AI-readable content · Citation tracking · Citation building · Reputation management · Google Business Profile optimization · Local SEO · Digital authority · AI strategy.

## Frequently asked

**How quickly will I see results?**
Most clients achieve full AI citation presence across major platforms within 60–90 days of activation.

**What makes this different from traditional SEO?**
Traditional SEO targets Google's link algorithm. We optimize for how generative AI models select and cite sources — entity building, structured authority signals, and citation-optimized content.

**What AI platforms do you cover?**
ChatGPT (OpenAI), Google Gemini, Google AI Overviews, Grok (xAI), Perplexity, plus emerging AI search engines as they launch.

**Do I need to create content myself?**
Only on the Sea Turtle tier (self-guided). Dolphin tier and above are fully done-for-you.

**How does this replace my marketing stack?**
Most businesses pay $13,000–$42,000/month across separate SEO agencies, social media managers, content writers, PR firms, reputation tools, and GMB services. Our unified system runs all 8 engines in concert from a single platform.

**Can I upgrade my tier later?**
Yes. Citation history and authority signals carry forward when you upgrade.

- **Email:** info@bluoceanrising.com
